steps.title: Find the opening claim
steps.content: The first sentence makes a general claim: Joni Mitchell uses images she creates for album covers to emphasize ideas in her music. The rest of the passage develops one example from Turbulent Indigo.

steps.title: Reject unsupported structures
steps.content: Choice B adds Mitchell's influence on other artists, which is absent. Choice C frames the text as similarity then difference, but no contrast is developed. Choice D suggests a broad discussion of songs on the album, which the passage does not provide. The answer is A.
